name: Swachh Bharat Mission – Urban 2.0
benefit_description: A Financial support of minimum Rs - 6667 (in Andhra Pradesh ,Bihar, Chhattisgarh ,Goa, Gujarat, Haryana, Jharkhand, Karnataka ,Kerala, Madhya Pradesh, Maharashtra ,Odisha, Punjab, Rajasthan, Tamil Nadu, Telangana, Uttar Pradesh, West Bengal), Rs - 12,000 (in Uttarakhand, Himachal Pradesh, Arunachal
details: A sanitation scheme for the construction of Individual Household Latrines (IHHL) for urban households. The Mission has the following components: Household toilets, including conversion of insanitary latrines into pour-flush latrines. Community toilets Public toilets Solid waste management IEC & Public Awareness Capacity building and Administrative & Office Expenses (A&OE)
eligibility_text: Any household that does not have access to an individual household toilet ( 80% of urban households engaging in open defecation ) or has an insanitary toilet.
application_url: Applicant creates an Applicant Login ID by registering on IHHL using Name , Mobile Number ,  Email , Address , ID Type, ID Number. After successful login the applicant enters the following details In
